name: Zuni Vegetable Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 Red Bell Pepper, Large (seeded and cut into 2 x 1/4-inch strips)
2 Chiles, Medium Size (seeded and cut into 2 x 1/2-inch strips)
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and cut the red bell pepper into 2 x 1/4-inch strips.
2. Seed and cut the chiles into 2 x 1/2-inch strips.
3. Cube squash (use Hubbard or acorn squash, about 1/2 pound).
4. Heat oil in a 4-quart Dutch oven over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; cook until onion is tender.
5. Stir in bell pepper, chiles, and jalapeno. Cook for 15 minutes.
6. Add squash, broth, salt, pepper, and coriander. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat.
7. Cover and simmer until squash is tender (about 15 minutes).
8. Stir in the remaining ingredients. Cook uncovered, stirring occasionally, until zucchini is tender (about 10 minutes).
